name: chat-markdown-export
description: Export the current VS Code chat session to a Markdown file in your workspace's vschats folder.
author: Jun Ye

chatMarkdownExport.includeReasoning.description: Include the assistant's internal reasoning ('thinking') blocks in the exported Markdown, wrapped in collapsible <details> sections.

chatMarkdownExport.openAfterExport.description: Open the exported Markdown file in the editor after a successful export.

chatMarkdownExport.overwriteExisting.description: When true, re-exporting a session overwrites the existing file. When false, a numeric suffix is added to avoid overwriting.
